context: A leaked administrative memo reveals a plan to bypass the standard Faculty Environmental Review process to construct a massive, water-draining AI data center on campus. This data center is deemed necessary by administration to ensure '99.99% automated grading uptime' for the new AI grading systems to process the work of 40,000 students without failure.
friction_point: Administrative Continuity vs. Environmental Accountability. 'Uptime', scale, and 'seamlessness' are prioritized over catastrophic local ecological damage and faculty oversight.
